items.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
items.summary_short: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards

items.title: Zhipu AI and Intel deepen AI PC partnership
items.summary_short: Zhipu AI announced an expanded partnership with Intel to deploy on-device versions of Zhipu Qingyan and the CodeGeeX AI coding assistant for AI PCs, showcasing joint innovation based on an integrated cloud-edge model product lineup

source_sections.label: Research Papers
source_sections.description: Research papers and paper-trending signals tied to the current day.

items.title: Nemotron-Cascade 2: Post-Training LLMs with Cascade RL and Multi-Domain On-Policy Distillation
items.summary_short: We introduce Nemotron-Cascade 2, an open 30B MoE model with 3B activated parameters that delivers best-in-class reasoning and strong agentic capabilities. Despite its compact size, its mathematical and coding reasoning performance approaches that of frontier open models.

topic_refs.headline: Nemotron-Cascade 2: Post-Training LLMs with Cascade RL and Multi-Domain On-Policy Distillation

items.title_zh: Nemotron-Cascade 2：通过 Cascade RL 和多领域 on-policy 蒸馏进行 LLM 后训练
items.summary_short_zh: 我们推出 Nemotron-Cascade 2，这是一款开放的 30B MoE 模型，激活参数为 3B，具备同类最佳的推理能力和强大的 agent 能力。尽管体量紧凑，其数学与代码推理性能已接近前沿开放模型。

items.title: Computational and Statistical Hardness of Calibration Distance
items.summary_short: The distance from calibration, introduced by Błasiok, Gopalan, Hu, and Nakkiran (STOC 2023), has recently emerged as a central measure of miscalibration for probabilistic predictors.

topic_refs.headline: Computational and Statistical Hardness of Calibration Distance

items.title_zh: 校准距离的计算与统计难度
items.summary_short_zh: 由 Błasiok、Gopalan、Hu 和 Nakkiran（STOC 2023）提出的校准距离，近来已成为衡量概率预测器失准程度的核心指标。

items.title: AS2 -- Attention-Based Soft Answer Sets: An End-to-End Differentiable Neuro-Soft-Symbolic Reasoning Architecture
items.summary_short: Neuro-symbolic artificial intelligence (AI) systems typically couple a neural perception module to a discrete symbolic solver through a non-differentiable boundary, preventing constraint-satisfaction feedback from reaching the perception encoder during training.

topic_refs.headline: AS2 -- Attention-Based Soft Answer Sets: An End-to-End Differentiable Neuro-Soft-Symbolic Reasoning Architecture

items.title_zh: AS2 -- 基于注意力的软答案集：端到端可微的神经-软符号推理架构
items.summary_short_zh: 神经符号人工智能（AI）系统通常通过一个不可微边界，将神经感知模块与离散符号求解器耦合起来，导致训练期间约束满足反馈无法传回感知编码器。

items.title: An SO(3)-equivariant reciprocal-space neural potential for long-range interactions
items.summary_short: Long-range electrostatic and polarization interactions play a central role in molecular and condensed-phase systems, yet remain fundamentally incompatible with locality-based machine-learning interatomic potentials.

topic_refs.headline: An SO(3)-equivariant reciprocal-space neural potential for long-range interactions

items.title_zh: 一种用于长程相互作用的 SO(3) 等变倒空间神经势
items.summary_short_zh: 长程静电与极化相互作用在分子和凝聚态系统中起核心作用，但它们与基于局部性的机器学习原子间势从根本上不兼容。

items.title: AIMER: Calibration-Free Task-Agnostic MoE Pruning
items.summary_short: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models increase parameter capacity without proportional per-token compute, but the deployment still requires storing all experts, making expert pruning important for reducing memory and serving overhead.

topic_refs.headline: AIMER: Calibration-Free Task-Agnostic MoE Pruning

items.title_zh: AIMER：无需校准的任务无关 MoE 剪枝
items.summary_short_zh: Mixture-of-Experts（MoE）语言模型在不按比例增加每 token 计算量的情况下提升了参数容量，但部署时仍需存储所有专家，因此专家剪枝对于降低内存和服务开销至关重要。

items.title: Generation Models Know Space: Unleashing Implicit 3D Priors for Scene Understanding
items.summary_short: While Multimodal Large Language Models demonstrate impressive semantic capabilities, they often suffer from spatial blindness, struggling with fine-grained geometric reasoning and physical dynamics.
items.spotlight_comment: While Multimodal Large Language Models demonstrate impressive semantic capabilities, they often suffer from spatial blindness, struggling with fine-grained geometric reasoning and physical dynamics.
items.title_zh: 生成模型懂空间：释放隐式 3D 先验以实现场景理解
items.summary_short_zh: 尽管多模态大语言模型展现出令人印象深刻的语义能力，但它们常常存在空间盲区，难以进行细粒度几何推理和物理动态理解。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 尽管多模态大语言模型展现出令人印象深刻的语义能力，但它们常常存在空间盲区，难以进行细粒度几何推理和物理动态理解。

items.title: SAMA: Factorized Semantic Anchoring and Motion Alignment for Instruction-Guided Video Editing
items.summary_short: Current instruction-guided video editing models struggle to simultaneously balance precise semantic modifications with faithful motion preservation.
items.spotlight_comment: Current instruction-guided video editing models struggle to simultaneously balance precise semantic modifications with faithful motion preservation.
items.title_zh: SAMA：用于指令引导视频编辑的因子化语义锚定与运动对齐
items.summary_short_zh: 当前的指令引导视频编辑模型难以同时兼顾精确的语义修改与真实的运动保留。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 当前的指令引导视频编辑模型难以同时兼顾精确的语义修改与真实的运动保留。

items.title: 3DreamBooth: High-Fidelity 3D Subject-Driven Video Generation Model
items.summary_short: Creating dynamic, view-consistent videos of customized subjects is highly sought after for a wide range of emerging applications, including immersive VR/AR, virtual production, and next-generation e-commerce.
items.spotlight_comment: Creating dynamic, view-consistent videos of customized subjects is highly sought after for a wide range of emerging applications, including immersive VR/AR, virtual production, and next-generation e-commerce.
items.title_zh: 3DreamBooth：高保真 3D 主体驱动视频生成模型
items.summary_short_zh: 为定制主体生成动态且视角一致的视频，正受到广泛需求，适用于沉浸式 VR/AR、虚拟制作和下一代电商等多种新兴应用。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 为定制主体生成动态且视角一致的视频，正受到广泛需求，适用于沉浸式 VR/AR、虚拟制作和下一代电商等多种新兴应用。

items.title: FASTER: Rethinking Real-Time Flow VLAs
items.summary_short: Real-time execution is crucial for deploying Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models in the physical world. Existing asynchronous inference methods primarily optimize trajectory smoothness, but neglect the critical latency in reacting to environmental changes.
items.spotlight_comment: Real-time execution is crucial for deploying Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models in the physical world.
items.title_zh: FASTER：重新思考实时流式 VLA
items.summary_short_zh: 在现实世界中部署视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型时，实时执行至关重要。现有异步推理方法主要优化轨迹平滑性，却忽视了对环境变化作出反应这一关键延迟。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 在现实世界中部署视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型时，实时执行至关重要。

items.title: Memento-Skills: Let Agents Design Agents
items.summary_short: We introduce Memento-Skills, a generalist, continually-learnable LLM agent system that functions as an agent-designing agent: it autonomously constructs, adapts, and improves task-specific agents through experience.
items.spotlight_comment: We introduce Memento-Skills, a generalist, continually-learnable LLM agent system that functions as an agent-designing agent: it autonomously constructs, adapts, and improves task-specific agents through experience.
items.title_zh: Memento-Skills：让智能体设计智能体
items.summary_short_zh: 我们提出 Memento-Skills，这是一种通用、可持续学习的 LLM 智能体系统，作为“设计智能体的智能体”运行：它通过经验自主构建、适应并改进任务特定的智能体。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 我们提出 Memento-Skills，这是一种通用、可持续学习的 LLM 智能体系统，作为“设计智能体的智能体”运行：它通过经验自主构建、适应并改进任务特定的智能体。

items.title: Bridging Semantic and Kinematic Conditions with Diffusion-based Discrete Motion Tokenizer
items.summary_short: Prior motion generation largely follows two paradigms: continuous diffusion models that excel at kinematic control, and discrete token-based generators that are effective for semantic conditioning.
items.spotlight_comment: Prior motion generation largely follows two paradigms: continuous diffusion models that excel at kinematic control, and discrete token-based generators that are effective for semantic conditioning.
items.title_zh: 用基于扩散的离散运动分词器连接语义与运动学条件
items.summary_short_zh: 以往的动作生成大致遵循两种范式：擅长运动学控制的连续扩散模型，以及适用于语义条件控制的离散 token 生成器。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 以往的动作生成大致遵循两种范式：擅长运动学控制的连续扩散模型，以及适用于语义条件控制的离散 token 生成器。

items.title: MonoArt: Progressive Structural Reasoning for Monocular Articulated 3D Reconstruction
items.summary_short: Reconstructing articulated 3D objects from a single image requires jointly inferring object geometry, part structure, and motion parameters from limited visual evidence.
items.spotlight_comment: Reconstructing articulated 3D objects from a single image requires jointly inferring object geometry, part structure, and motion parameters from limited visual evidence.
items.title_zh: MonoArt：用于单目可动关节 3D 重建的渐进式结构推理
items.summary_short_zh: 从单张图像重建可动关节 3D 物体，需要从有限的视觉证据中联合推断物体几何、部件结构和运动参数。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 从单张图像重建可动关节 3D 物体，需要从有限的视觉证据中联合推断物体几何、部件结构和运动参数。

items.summary_short: Prior motion generation largely follows two paradigms: continuous diffusion models that excel at kinematic control, and discrete token-based generators that are effective for semantic conditioning.
items.spotlight_comment: Prior motion generation largely follows two paradigms: continuous diffusion models that excel at kinematic control, and discrete token-based generators that are effective for semantic conditioning.
items.title_zh: 用基于扩散的离散运动分词器连接语义与运动学条件
items.summary_short_zh: 以往的动作生成主要遵循两种范式：擅长运动学控制的连续扩散模型，以及在语义条件控制方面有效的离散 token 生成器。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 以往的动作生成主要遵循两种范式：擅长运动学控制的连续扩散模型，以及在语义条件控制方面有效的离散 token 生成器。

items.title: MonoArt: Progressive Structural Reasoning for Monocular Articulated 3D Reconstruction
items.summary_short: Reconstructing articulated 3D objects from a single image requires jointly inferring object geometry, part structure, and motion parameters from limited visual evidence.
items.spotlight_comment: Reconstructing articulated 3D objects from a single image requires jointly inferring object geometry, part structure, and motion parameters from limited visual evidence.
items.title_zh: MonoArt：用于单目可动体 3D 重建的渐进式结构推理
items.summary_short_zh: 从单张图像重建可动的 3D 物体，需要从有限的视觉证据中联合推断物体几何、部件结构和运动参数。
items.spotlight_comment_zh: 从单张图像重建可动的 3D 物体，需要从有限的视觉证据中联合推断物体几何、部件结构和运动参数。

topics.headline: Nemotron-Cascade 2: Post-Training LLMs with Cascade RL and Multi-Domain On-Policy Distillation
topics.summary_short: We introduce Nemotron-Cascade 2, an open 30B MoE model with 3B activated parameters that delivers best-in-class reasoning and strong agentic capabilities. Despite its compact size, its mathematical and coding reasoning performance approaches that of frontier open models.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 2 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Nemotron-Cascade 2: Post-Training LLMs with Cascade RL and Multi-Domain On-Policy Distillation
evidence.title_zh: Nemotron-Cascade 2：通过 Cascade RL 和多领域 On-Policy Distillation 对 LLM 进行后训练

evidence.title: Nemotron-Cascade 2: Post-Training LLMs with Cascade RL and Multi-Domain On-Policy Distillation
evidence.title_zh: Nemotron-Cascade 2：通过 Cascade RL 和多领域 On-Policy Distillation 对 LLM 进行后训练

topics.headline_zh: Nemotron-Cascade 2：通过 Cascade RL 和多领域 On-Policy Distillation 对 LLM 进行后训练
topics.summary_short_zh: 我们推出 Nemotron-Cascade 2，这是一款开放的 30B MoE 模型，激活参数为 3B，具备同类最佳的推理能力和强大的 agentic capabilities。尽管体量紧凑，其数学和代码推理性能已接近前沿开源模型。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 2 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: AIMER: Calibration-Free Task-Agnostic MoE Pruning
topics.summary_short: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models increase parameter capacity without proportional per-token compute, but the deployment still requires storing all experts, making expert pruning important for reducing memory and serving overhead.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: AIMER: Calibration-Free Task-Agnostic MoE Pruning
evidence.title_zh: AIMER：免校准、任务无关的 MoE 剪枝

topics.headline_zh: AIMER：免校准、任务无关的 MoE 剪枝
topics.summary_short_zh: Mixture-of-Experts（MoE）语言模型在不按比例增加每 token 计算量的情况下提升了参数容量，但部署时仍需存储所有专家，因此专家剪枝对于降低内存占用和服务开销至关重要。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: An SO(3)-equivariant reciprocal-space neural potential for long-range interactions
topics.summary_short: Long-range electrostatic and polarization interactions play a central role in molecular and condensed-phase systems, yet remain fundamentally incompatible with locality-based machine-learning interatomic potentials.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: An SO(3)-equivariant reciprocal-space neural potential for long-range interactions
evidence.title_zh: 一种用于长程相互作用的 SO(3) 等变倒空间神经势

topics.headline_zh: 一种用于长程相互作用的 SO(3) 等变倒空间神经势
topics.summary_short_zh: 长程静电和极化相互作用在分子和凝聚态系统中起核心作用，但与基于局域性的机器学习原子间势在根本上并不兼容。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: AS2 -- Attention-Based Soft Answer Sets: An End-to-End Differentiable Neuro-Soft-Symbolic Reasoning Architecture
topics.summary_short: Neuro-symbolic artificial intelligence (AI) systems typically couple a neural perception module to a discrete symbolic solver through a non-differentiable boundary, preventing constraint-satisfaction feedback from reaching the perception encoder during training.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: AS2 -- Attention-Based Soft Answer Sets: An End-to-End Differentiable Neuro-Soft-Symbolic Reasoning Architecture
evidence.title_zh: AS2——基于注意力的软答案集：端到端可微的神经-软符号推理架构

topics.headline_zh: AS2——基于注意力的软答案集：端到端可微的神经-软符号推理架构
topics.summary_short_zh: 神经符号人工智能（AI）系统通常通过一个不可微边界，将神经感知模块与离散符号求解器耦合起来，导致约束满足反馈在训练期间无法传回感知编码器。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。

topics.headline: Computational and Statistical Hardness of Calibration Distance
topics.summary_short: The distance from calibration, introduced by Błasiok, Gopalan, Hu, and Nakkiran (STOC 2023), has recently emerged as a central measure of miscalibration for probabilistic predictors.
topics.why_it_matters: This research paper surfaced across 1 independent source(s).

evidence.title: Computational and Statistical Hardness of Calibration Distance
evidence.title_zh: 校准距离的计算与统计难度

topics.headline_zh: 校准距离的计算与统计难度
topics.summary_short_zh: 由 Błasiok、Gopalan、Hu 和 Nakkiran（STOC 2023）提出的校准距离，近来已成为衡量概率预测器失准程度的核心指标。
topics.why_it_matters_zh: 这篇研究论文出现在 1 个独立来源中。
